series_metadata.series_description: Documents negotiation and contract process between labor unions and the Ohio Attorney General's Office (AGO). Records include, but are not limited to, previous contract, final contract, negotiation minutes, agreed-upon and signed articles of collective bargaining agreement, management notes and proposals, action log, and mediation fact-finding reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 12 years after new contract is approved. If scanned and saved electronically, dispose of paper immediately. ; Electronic: Retain 12 years after new contract is approved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
